name: I slipped on ice at work in Salt Lake City and hurt my back bad, what do I do first?
description: Report to employer ASAP, get medical help, take photos, and file workers' comp claim immediately.

mainEntity.name: I slipped on ice at work in Salt Lake City and hurt my back bad, what do I do first?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer ASAP, get medical help, take photos, and file workers' comp claim immediately.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report the injury to your employer immediately and seek medical treatment.** In Utah, workplace slip and falls fall under workers' compensation, which covers medical bills and lost wages regardless of fault.[3][4] Key factors: Document the scene with photos, get witness statements, and file a claim within days to avoid denial. Notify your boss in writing, attend all doctor visits, and avoid giving recorded statements to insurance. Consult a workers' comp attorney early to protect your benefits.
